languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

languages.text: "Чепуха. На подобных мирах можно обнаружить уникальные феномены, и тассерций тому примером. Впрочем, коллега, если вы предпочитаете потакать собственной гордыне, а не познавать мироздание во всей его полноте, не стану вам мешать".

"Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

"Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

languages.text: «Absurdo. Se pueden encontrar fenómenos únicos en mundos como este, y el thassertio es prueba de ello. Sin embargo, estimado colega, si prefiere satisfacer su orgullo a explorar toda la creación, no me interpondré en su camino».
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

traits.locale_text: «Absurdo. Se pueden encontrar fenómenos únicos en mundos como este, y el thassertio es prueba de ello. Sin embargo, estimado colega, si prefiere satisfacer su orgullo a explorar toda la creación, no me interpondré en su camino».

languages.text: 「ばかげています。このような世界にこそ、唯一無二の現象は見出されるのです。タッセリウムがその好例でしょう。とはいえ、尊敬する同僚、全創造を探求するよりもご自身の自尊心を満たすほうをお好みなら、私が口を挟む筋合いはありません」
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

traits.locale_text: 「ばかげています。このような世界にこそ、唯一無二の現象は見出されるのです。タッセリウムがその好例でしょう。とはいえ、尊敬する同僚、全創造を探求するよりもご自身の自尊心を満たすほうをお好みなら、私が口を挟む筋合いはありません」

languages.text: “一派胡言。这种世界上往往能找到独特的现象，塔瑟拉水晶就是绝佳的例证。不过，如果你宁愿沉溺于自己的傲慢，也不愿探索万物奥秘，那我也无权干涉，尊敬的同僚。”
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

traits.locale_text: “一派胡言。这种世界上往往能找到独特的现象，塔瑟拉水晶就是绝佳的例证。不过，如果你宁愿沉溺于自己的傲慢，也不愿探索万物奥秘，那我也无权干涉，尊敬的同僚。”

languages.text: "Unsinn. Einzigartige Phänomene sind auf Welten wie dieser an der Tagesordnung und Thassertium ist ein Paradebeispiel dafür. Allerdings, geschätzter Kollege, wenn Ihr lieber Eurer eigenen Eitelkeit schmeichelt, anstatt die gesamte Schöpfung zu erforschen, liegt es mir fern, Euch dabei zu stören."
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

traits.locale_text: "Unsinn. Einzigartige Phänomene sind auf Welten wie dieser an der Tagesordnung und Thassertium ist ein Paradebeispiel dafür. Allerdings, geschätzter Kollege, wenn Ihr lieber Eurer eigenen Eitelkeit schmeichelt, anstatt die gesamte Schöpfung zu erforschen, liegt es mir fern, Euch dabei zu stören."

languages.text: « Balivernes. Les mondes comme celui-ci présentent des phénomènes uniques, le thassertium en est l'exemple parfait. Cependant, cher collègue, si vous préférez votre propre orgueil à l'exploration de la création, loin de moi l'idée de m'y opposer. »
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."

traits.locale_text: « Balivernes. Les mondes comme celui-ci présentent des phénomènes uniques, le thassertium en est l'exemple parfait. Cependant, cher collègue, si vous préférez votre propre orgueil à l'exploration de la création, loin de moi l'idée de m'y opposer. »

languages.text: "Saçmalık. Tasertiyum gibi benzersiz fenomenler bu dünyada bulunabilir. Ancak saygıdeğer meslektaşım, eğer yaratılışın tamamını keşfetmek yerine kendi kibrinizi tatmin etmeyi tercih ediyorsanız müdahale etmek bana düşmez."
languages.original_text: "Nonsense. Unique phenomena can be found on worlds such as this one, and thassertium is a case in point. However, esteemed colleague, if you prefer to indulge your own pride rather than explore all of creation, far be it from me to interfere."
